questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. In the story, the protagonist was known for his VALOUR in battle.
questions.explanation: C) Cowardice कायरता

questions.question: Select the most appropriate word for the given group of words To move about from place to place aimlessly
questions.explanation: B) Meander(verb)- To move about from place to place aimlesslyभूल भुलैया

questions.question: Select the most appropriate word to fill in the blank The sculpture was designed to __________ the artist’s ideals of freedom and expression.
questions.explanation: A) Embody'का उपयोग होगा क्योंकि "embody" का अर्थ होता है किसी विचार, भावना या गुण को स्पष्ट रूप से प्रस्तुत करना। वाक्य में यह बताया गया है कि मूर्ति को कलाकार के स्वतंत्रता और अभिव्यक्ति के आदर्शों को प्रदर्शित करने के लिए डिजाइन किया गया था, इसलिए 'embody' यहाँ सही विकल्प है। जबकि 'Elude' का अर्थ है बच निकलना या पकड़ में न आना, 'Extinguish' का अर्थ है बुझाना, और 'Obscure' का अर्थ है अस्पष्ट करना, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। Embody'will be used because it means to clearly represent or express an idea, feeling, or quality. The sentence mentions that the sculpture was designed to represent the artist's ideals of freedom and expression, making 'embody' the correct choice. Whereas, 'Elude' means to escape or avoid, 'Extinguish' means to put out, and 'Obscure' means to make unclear, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. The large windows allowed an ABUNDANCE of natural light to fill the room.
questions.explanation: A) Scarcity

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A. In the age of so-called smart cities, the term ‘urban flooding’ sounds almost like an oxymoron B. On the contrary, flooded roads are a common sight during the monsoon in cities across the country, right from Delhi and Chandigarh in the north to Chennai and Bengaluru in the south. C. After all, a smart city ought to have an efficient stormwater drainage system that can handle a few hours’ downpour, at the very least. D. Gurugram, the Millennium City, has failed to solve this problem despite having spent more than Rs 100 crore on anti-waterlogging measures in the past three years.
questions.explanation: D) a, c, b, d a: Sentence a comes first because it introduces the topic by making a general observation about the concept of "urban flooding" and how it seems contradictory in the context of smart cities. The article "the" used here specifies a particular context, making this sentence an introductory statement. C: After introducing the irony in sentence a, sentence c provides a rationale by explaining why urban flooding shouldn't occur in smart cities. "After all" acts as a connecting phrase, linking it to the idea presented in sentence a. The conjunction "that" also serves to introduce a subordinate clause, elaborating on the expectations of a smart city's infrastructure. b: The phrase "On the contrary" is used to contrast the idea of efficient infrastructure (mentioned in sentence c) with the reality of flooding in various cities. d: The sentence is connected to the previous sentences by further illustrating the issue discussed in sentence b. The past participle "having spent" indicates an action that occurred before the continuing issue of waterlogging, showing the temporal sequence of events.

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: B) The incorrect spelling is Postuer, which should be correctly spelled as Posture. आसन

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. The police launched a nationwide manhunt after the abduction of a prominent businessman.
questions.explanation: D) Abduction(noun) – kidnapping, capture, seizure, snatching, hijacking अपहरण Synonym: Kidnapping(noun) – Unlawful capture. अपहरण Rescue– Opposite action. बचाव Release– Freeing. रिहाई Return– Bring back. वापसी

questions.explanation: D) The incorrectly spelt word is D.Dissappoint, which should be spelled asDisappoint(correct spelling). Let’s analyze each option in detail: निराश करना

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: C) The incorrectly spelt word is C.Assesment. The correct spelling isAssessment, which means “the evaluation or estimation of the nature, quality, or ability of someone or something” (मूल्यांकन).

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. His thesis on artificial intelligence earned him a prestigious award.
questions.explanation: C) Thesis(noun) – dissertation, argument, proposition, theory, hypothesis शोध-प्रबंध / प्रस्ताव Synonym: Dissertation(noun) – Research paper, study. शोध-निबंध Guess(noun) – Assumption, speculation. अनुमान Story(noun) – Tale, narrative. कहानी Joke(noun) – Prank, jest. मज़ाक

questions.question: Choose the word that can substitute the given group of words. Something that is necessary or crucial
questions.explanation: C) 'Indispensable'.(adjective)- Something that is necessary or crucialअपरिहार्य

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. The teacher's explanation was succinct and easy to understand.
questions.explanation: A) ElaborateA) Elaborate(adjective) – Complex, intricate, detailed, ornate, involvedविस्तृतB) Coherent (adjective) – Logical, clear, lucid, intelligible, articulateसुसंगतC) Concise(adjective) – Succinct, brief, terse, to the point, compactसंक्षिप्तD) Lucid(adjective) – Clear, transparent, understandable, unambiguous, intelligibleस्पष्ट

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. A far-sighted leader anticipates future challenges and prepares the nation to face them effectively.
questions.explanation: D) Far-sighted(adjective) – visionary, foresighted, prudent, perceptive, wise दूरदर्शी Synonym: Visionary(adjective) – Foresighted. भविष्यदृष्टा Shortsighted(adjective) – Lacking foresight. अदूरदर्शी Careless(adjective) – Negligent. लापरवाह Reckless(adjective) – Rash. असावधान

questions.question: Select the most appropriate idiom to fill in the blank. I was going to mention it, but it ________.
questions.explanation: C)Slipped my mind(idiom) – To be forgotten or not remembered.याद से बाहर हो जाना

questions.question: Select the most appropriate word to fill in the blank Despite extensive training, the team couldn’t _____ the full extent of the complex strategy during the game.
questions.explanation: D)'Fathom'का use होगा क्योंकि "fathom" का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ को पूरी तरह से समझना या गहराई तक जानना। वाक्य में बताया गया है कि extensive training के बावजूद टीम खेल के दौरान जटिल रणनीति को पूरी तरह समझ नहीं पाई, इसलिए 'fathom' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Evade' का अर्थ है बचना या टालना, 'Consolidate' का अर्थ है मजबूत करना या एकजुट करना, और 'Interrupt' का अर्थ है बाधा डालना, जो इस context में सही नहीं है। 'Fathom'will be used because it means to fully understand or grasp something. The sentence mentions that despite extensive training, the team couldn’t fully grasp the complex strategy during the game, making 'fathom' the correct choice. Whereas, 'Evade' means to avoid or escape, 'Consolidate' means to strengthen or unite, and 'Interrupt' means to disrupt, which don’t fit in this context.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate idiom or phrase to complete the given sentence. I like her because she never likes to make _________.
questions.explanation: C)a quick buck(idiom) – Trying to earn money quickly and easily, often through unethical means.त्वरित धन कमाना

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Keep a straight face
options: Get on extremely well with someone
Not laugh or change your expression even though you want to laugh
questions.explanation: D)Keep a straight face(idiom) – Not laugh or change your expression even though you want to laughहंसी रोकना।

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment thatcontains a grammatical error. The compensation that the [A] / Government agreed to provide to [B] / the dependents of the [C] / train accident is fairly less [D].
questions.explanation: A) Segment [D] में "fairly less" का प्रयोग गलत है। "Fairly" का use सकारात्मक अर्थ वाले adjectives या adverbs के साथ किया जाता है, जैसे कि "fairly good" या "fairly well"। यहाँ "less" के साथ "fairly" का use व्याकरण की दृष्टि से गलत है। सही वाक्य होगा: "is rather less" या "is quite less", क्योंकि "rather" और "quite" दोनों negative या तुलनात्मक adjectives के साथ सही रूप से use किए जा सकते हैं। Segment [D] contains the grammatical error. The phrase "fairly less" is incorrect. "Fairly" is used with positive adjectives or adverbs, such as "fairly good" or "fairly well." In this context, the correct phrase should be "is rather less" or "is quite less" because "rather" and "quite" can be correctly used with negative or comparative adjectives.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. In August, she will be / enjoying / all the fruits her grandmother / will plant last January.
questions.explanation: C)'will plant'का प्रयोग गलत है क्योंकि यह घटना Past Tense में हो चुकी है। 'Last January' का संकेत है कि यह घटना पहले हो चुकी थी, इसलिए यहाँ 'planted' का प्रयोग होना चाहिए। The phrase 'will plant' is incorrect because the event has already occurred in the past, as indicated by 'last January.' Hence, the correct verb form is 'planted' to match the past tense context.

questions.question: Select the correct option to form a meaningful sentence. Changing monsoon patterns (a) / the Intergovernmental Panel (b) / last month (c) /, deadlier heatwaves, (d)/ rising sea levels (e) / pose an acute risk (f) / on Climate Change (g) / a report by (h) / to the agriculture sector in India, (i) / warned (j) / and intense storms (k)
options: a, d, c, e, f, i, h, g, k, j, b
a, d, e, k, f, i, h, b, g, j, c
a, d, b, e, f, i, h, c, g, k, j
a, d, c, e, g, f, i, h, b, k, j
questions.explanation: B) a, d, e, k, f, i, h, b, g, j, c Changing monsoon patterns, deadlier heatwaves, rising sea levels and intense storms pose an acute risk to the agriculture sector in India, a report by the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change warned last month. The sentence begins by listing the climate-related challenges (a, d, e, k). These challenges "pose an acute risk" (f) to a specific sector—agriculture in India (i). A report (h) by the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (b, g) is identified as the source of this warning. The report "warned" (j) about these risks, and this warning was issued "last month" (c).

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully andselect the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Centuries ago, Aryabhata, one of the most famous Indian mathematicians and astronomers(1)__________ the concept of zero, the base of the present (2)_______ system. With time,zero became a stepping stone to (3)_______ simplified computations, (4)______ the ways for development of algebra, algorithms and calculus, three pillars of modern mathematics, while eventually laying the (5)______ for computers. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank 1.
questions.explanation: A)Propounded'का use होगा क्योंकि यह past tense में है और वाक्य "Centuries ago" से शुरू होता है, जो दर्शाता है कि यह घटना अतीत में हुई थी। "Propounded" का अर्थ है किसी विचार या सिद्धांत को प्रस्तुत करना। यहाँ, यह दर्शाता है कि आर्यभट्ट ने शून्य की अवधारणा को प्रस्तुत किया था। 'Propound' का उपयोग नहीं होगा क्योंकि यह base form है, जो present या infinitive के लिए प्रयोग किया जाता है। 'Has propounded' का उपयोग नहीं होगा क्योंकि यह present perfect tense है, जो वर्तमान से संबंधित होता है। 'Propounds' का उपयोग भी नहीं होगा क्योंकि यह present indefinite tense है, जो वर्तमान में किसी नियमित क्रिया को दर्शाता है। Propounded'will be used because the sentence starts with "Centuries ago," indicating an action completed in the past. "Propounded" means to put forward or propose an idea or concept, which fits the context as Aryabhata presented the concept of zero. 'Propound' is incorrect as it is the base form, typically used in the present or infinitive context. 'Has propounded' is incorrect because it is in present perfect tense, which suggests a connection to the present. 'Propounds' is also incorrect as it is in present indefinite tense, which refers to habitual actions or general truths in the present.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully andselect the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Centuries ago, Aryabhata, one of the most famous Indian mathematicians and astronomers(1)__________ the concept of zero, the base of the present (2)_______ system. With time,zero became a stepping stone to (3)_______ simplified computations, (4)______ the ways for development of algebra, algorithms and calculus, three pillars of modern mathematics, while eventually laying the (5)______ for computers. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank 2.
questions.explanation: C)Numeral'का use होगा क्योंकि "numeral" का अर्थ है अंकों का एक प्रतीकात्मक प्रतिनिधित्व जो गणना के लिए उपयोग किया जाता है। यहाँ passage में कहा गया है कि "zero" आधुनिक प्रणाली (system) का आधार है, इसलिए 'numeral system' सही है। 'Numerology' का अर्थ होता है अंकों का अध्ययन और उनकी रहस्यमय व्याख्या, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। 'Numerically' एक क्रिया विशेषण है जिसका उपयोग अंकीय संदर्भ में किया जाता है, लेकिन यह यहाँ अनुचित है क्योंकि 'system' को विशेषण चाहिए। 'Numerological' एक विशेषण है लेकिन यह अंक ज्योतिष से संबंधित है, जो इस context में उपयुक्त नहीं है Numeral'will be used because it refers to the symbolic representation of numbers used for computation. The passage states that zero is the base of the modern system, making 'numeral system' the correct choice. 'Numerology' means the study of numbers and their mystical significance, which does not fit the context. 'Numerically' is an adverb that refers to something in numerical terms but does not align grammatically with 'system,' which requires an adjective. 'Numerological' is an adjective relating to numerology, which is unrelated to the context here

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully andselect the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Centuries ago, Aryabhata, one of the most famous Indian mathematicians and astronomers(1)__________ the concept of zero, the base of the present (2)_______ system. With time,zero became a stepping stone to (3)_______ simplified computations, (4)______ the ways for development of algebra, algorithms and calculus, three pillars of modern mathematics, while eventually laying the (5)______ for computers. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank 3.
questions.explanation: D)Many'का use होगा क्योंकि "many" का अर्थ है "अनेक" या "कई," और यह वाक्य में "simplified computations" (सरल गणनाओं) को संदर्भित करने के लिए उपयुक्त है। यहाँ "computations" (गणनाओं) को एक गिनने योग्य संज्ञा के रूप में संदर्भित किया गया है, और "many" इसके लिए सही विकल्प है। 'Scarcely' का अर्थ है "शायद ही" या "बहुत कम," जो इस वाक्य में गलत है क्योंकि यह सरलीकरण की बात कर रहा है, न कि सीमितता की। 'Much' का उपयोग असंख्य (uncountable) संज्ञाओं के लिए होता है, जबकि यहाँ " computations" गिनने योग्य (countable) है। 'Sadly' का अर्थ है "दुखपूर्वक," जो वाक्य के सन्दर्भ में अप्रासंगिक है। 'Many'will be used because it means "several" or "a large number," and it is appropriate here to describe "simplified computations." The sentence refers to computations as countable, and "many" correctly aligns with this usage. Other options are incorrect: 'Scarcely' means "barely" or "hardly," which does not fit in the positive context of simplifications. 'Much' is used with uncountable nouns, whereas "computations" here are countable, making "many" more accurate. 'Sadly' means "with sadness" or "unfortunately," which is irrelevant in the given context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully andselect the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Centuries ago, Aryabhata, one of the most famous Indian mathematicians and astronomers(1)__________ the concept of zero, the base of the present (2)_______ system. With time,zero became a stepping stone to (3)_______ simplified computations, (4)______ the ways for development of algebra, algorithms and calculus, three pillars of modern mathematics, while eventually laying the (5)______ for computers. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank 4.
questions.explanation: 'C)Paving'का use होगा क्योंकि "paving" एक present participle है जो यहाँ कार्य की प्रक्रिया को दर्शा रहा है। sentence में mention है कि शून्य ने सरल गणनाओं का आधार बनाते हुए बीजगणित, एल्गोरिदम और कलन के विकास के लिए मार्ग प्रशस्त किया। अन्य विकल्प जैसे 'was paved' (अतीत में किसी कार्य को पूरा किया गया था), 'have paved' (वर्तमान पूर्ण काल), और 'has been paved' (वर्तमान पूर्ण भूतकाल की प्रक्रिया) इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। 'Paving'is correct because it is a present participle, used here to describe the ongoing process of making a path for the development of algebra, algorithms, and calculus. The sentence emphasizes the role of zero in facilitating this progress. The other options, such as 'was paved' (past tense), 'have paved' (present perfect tense), and 'has been paved' (present perfect passive voice), do not fit the continuous and descriptive context of this sentence.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully andselect the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Centuries ago, Aryabhata, one of the most famous Indian mathematicians and astronomers(1)__________ the concept of zero, the base of the present (2)_______ system. With time,zero became a stepping stone to (3)_______ simplified computations, (4)______ the ways for development of algebra, algorithms and calculus, three pillars of modern mathematics, while eventually laying the (5)______ for computers. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank 5.
questions.explanation: B)Foundation'का use होगा क्योंकि यह 'मूलभूत आधार' या 'नींव' का अर्थ दर्शाता है। sentence में बताया गया है कि शून्य ने अंततः आधुनिक गणित के तीन स्तंभों के विकास में मदद की और कंप्यूटर के लिए नींव रखी। इसलिए, 'foundation' इस संदर्भ में सही है। जबकि, 'origin' का अर्थ है 'उत्पत्ति,' जो यहाँ उपयुक्त नहीं है क्योंकि संदर्भ में नींव की बात हो रही है। 'Creation' का अर्थ 'सृजन' है, जो इस वाक्य के भाव में फिट नहीं बैठता। 'Activation' का अर्थ है 'सक्रिय करना,' जो वाक्य के विचार के अनुरूप नहीं है। 'Foundation'will be used because it means the "base" or "groundwork" of something. The sentence states that zero eventually paved the way for modern mathematics and laid the groundwork for computers, making 'foundation' the most appropriate choice. Whereas, 'origin' means "beginning," which doesn’t align with the idea of establishing a base. 'Creation' refers to "making something new," which doesn’t fit the context here. 'Activation' implies "starting or enabling," which doesn’t match the context of laying a base.
